description_long: This house is a modern, boxy structure set on a rectangular grassy plot with a black asphalt driveway and road intersecting in front. The building features a flat roof and a multi-level design, with the main facade showcasing a mix of large windows and solid wall segments, likely using a combination of concrete and glass. The front elevation is visually dynamic, with a prominent entryway and a series of horizontal and vertical elements that break up the massing. The side and rear views reveal more solid wall surfaces with fewer windows, emphasizing privacy and structural simplicity. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level slightly offset from the lower, creating architectural interest. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist geometric design, set on a grassy lot with an intersecting asphalt driveway and road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the intersecting driveway and road.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall surfaces and the elongated driveway leading to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a clear view of the flat roof and horizontal extensions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway intersection and a partial glimpse of the front facade's window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and large glass panels flanking the door
